Re: Reguest for Written Opinion
Dear Mr. Hallabrin:
As general counsel for the Capistrano Bay District, 
a
California Community Services District, 
we are currently faced
with a potential conflict of interest issue. Accordingly, we
r:espectfully request a written opinion relative to the following
facts:
There are eighteen (18) parcels of land 1ocated within
the boundaries of the Capistrano Bay District; 
al1 are twelve
(L2l feet in width, and are situated between residentiaL lots.
The Capistrano Bay District 
has record title 
to the eighteen
parcefs, but a number of adjoining owners have claimed and
occupied a number of these lots as their own. One such owner is
a member of the Board of Directors of the District.
QUESTION: May that member participate in 
any
discussion of the Board of Directors reliting tt ttre subject
parcels ?
BKO : yo
